subcodes.first_line: O resplendent star and triumphant lion! His honour Áqá Siyyid Nasru'lláh hath expressed utmost satisfaction with the character [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شهاب ثاقب و ای هزبر غالب جناب آقا سید نصرالله نهایت رضایت را از اخلاق و
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement
